title: The Ultimate PvP Modpack (UPDATED!)
description:
The Ultimate Modpack for Minecraft Combat.
Many useful mods such as Inventory Hud+ and Apple Skin to indicate your saturation; an important feature in Combat Situations.
body:
# The Ultimate PvP Modpack
- An amazing modpack i've created for enjoying Combat in Minecraft.
- Many great mods which enhance your experience while playing
- Gives an average of 300+ fps, even on low power computers.
- ~~Bundled with many texturepacks good for PvP~~ (not anymore due to my overlay being better)
  
Great with [My PvP Overlay on Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cattos-overlay)
 
# How to install?
1. You can install the modpack via [the Modrinth app](https://modrinth.com/app), or any other 3rd party launcher that supports it.
   
2. You can also use a [.mrpack to .zip converter](https://fabulously-optimized.github.io/mrpack-to-zip/).
Instructions are on the website.

# Is it actually good for pvp though?
  Yes! Multiple pro crystal pvpers also use this modpack such as Quelchi (q9y - LT1), Mexus (xMexus - HT2) and even me (Cattonator - LT2).
  This modpack promises the best pvp experience out of any other modpacks out there!
